beats.Exposition \u0026 Initial Setup: Establish a magical world on the brink of conflict.
beats.Inciting Incident: A violent attack or mission forces the hero into action.
beats.Core Conflict: Magic and warfare collide as the hero confronts a powerful enemy.
beats.Rising Action: Battles, chases, and magical trials escalate.
beats.Midpoint Revelation: A hidden truth reshapes the quest and the stakes.
beats.Crisis: The hero must risk everything for the mission.
beats.Climax: A decisive magical battle determines the fate of the realm.

beats.Exposition \u0026 Initial Setup: Introduce a wondrous world with unsettling shadows.
beats.Inciting Incident: A dark magical force emerges.
beats.Core Conflict: The hero faces ancient terrors tied to the world’s magic.
beats.Rising Action: Nightmarish creatures and cursed lands intensify the danger.
beats.Midpoint Revelation: The horror’s origin is revealed.
beats.Crisis: The hero must confront fear itself.
beats.Climax: A desperate battle against the monstrous or the unknown.
beats.Aftermath: The world survives, changed and haunted.

beats.Exposition \u0026 Initial Setup: Establish a magical realm with political or arcane secrets.
beats.Inciting Incident: A magical crime or disappearance disrupts the kingdom.
beats.Core Conflict: The hero investigates clues tied to ancient lore.
beats.Rising Action: Suspects, spells, and hidden factions complicate the truth.
beats.Midpoint Revelation: A secret prophecy or betrayal is uncovered.
beats.Crisis: The hero is framed or endangered by the real culprit.
beats.Climax: The truth is revealed in a magical confrontation.

beats.Exposition \u0026 Initial Setup: Introduce a magical world where reality is unstable.
beats.Inciting Incident: A spell, vision, or prophecy distorts perception.
beats.Core Conflict: The hero questions allies, memories, and magic.
beats.Rising Action: Manipulation, illusions, and mind magic blur truth.
beats.Midpoint Revelation: The hero’s identity or destiny is not what it seemed.
beats.Crisis: They must choose which reality to trust.
beats.Climax: A confrontation reveals the true manipulator.

beats.Exposition \u0026 Initial Setup: A hero reflects on their past in a magical world.
beats.Inciting Incident: A relic or memory forces them to revisit old wounds.
beats.Midpoint Revelation: A forgotten truth reshapes the hero’s identity.
beats.Crisis: They must confront the past directly.

beats.Exposition \u0026 Initial Setup: Introduce hero, magical world, and emotional wound.
beats.Inciting Incident: A fated or forbidden magical encounter sparks attraction.
beats.Core Conflict: Love clashes with prophecy, politics, or magic.
beats.Rising Action: Trials deepen both danger and desire.
beats.Midpoint Revelation: A secret threatens the relationship.
beats.Crisis: The lovers are torn apart by duty or fate.
beats.Climax: A sacrifice or magical vow reunites them.

beats.Exposition \u0026 Initial Setup: Establish a lush magical world and a destined bond.
beats.Inciting Incident: Magic entwines the lovers’ fates.
beats.Core Conflict: Their connection disrupts kingdoms or ancient powers.
beats.Midpoint Revelation: A prophecy or curse threatens their union.
beats.Crisis: They must choose between love and destiny.
beats.Climax: A magical union or sacrifice breaks the curse.
beats.Aftermath: A restored world shaped by their love.

beats.Exposition \u0026 Initial Setup: A magical world intersects with advanced technology.
beats.Inciting Incident: A futuristic anomaly disrupts ancient magic.
beats.Core Conflict: The hero navigates clashing systems of power.
beats.Rising Action: Tech and magic collide in escalating conflict.
beats.Midpoint Revelation: The worlds share a hidden origin.
beats.Crisis: The hero must bridge or choose between them.
beats.Climax: A fusion of magic and science determines the future.
beats.Aftermath: A new hybrid world emerges. ACTION — Hybrid Structures

beats.Exposition \u0026 Initial Setup: Introduce a skilled hero in a dangerous world.

beats.Midpoint Revelation: The horror is smarter or closer than expected.
beats.Crisis: The hero must risk everything to escape.
beats.Climax: A brutal showdown with the creature or force.

beats.Exposition \u0026 Initial Setup: A capable hero faces a puzzling crime.

beats.Exposition \u0026 Initial Setup: A veteran reflects on a life of missions.

beats.Exposition \u0026 Initial Setup: A grounded love story begins in a world touched by magic.
